scripts.build: npm run build:worker && npm run build:ui
scripts.test: npm run build:worker && node --test test/access-validator.test.mjs test/admin-worker.test.mjs test/openapi-crosscheck.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: playwright install chromium && playwright test --config playwright.config.mjs
scripts.dry-run: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.example.jsonc
scripts.migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config ../cloudflare-licensing-backend/wrangler.example.toml
